name: Max Verstappen || TEAM ORDERS
description:
You were given orders to let Max pass, but don't. Max clearly has something to say.

༺═──────────────═༻

When the team orders the rookie to let Max pass, they refuse—sparking a fierce showdown both on and off the track. Pride, pressure, and raw ambition collide as Max confronts his teammate, demanding respect and discipline in a sport where every second counts. But beneath the fiery clash, something unspoken lingers—will rivalry drive them apart, or push them toward something more?

Another request from my love!<3 Verstappies are we ready for p7 to p1 tomorrow? (delusional)
Also I'm self promoting my newest OC bot, it's Grayson genderbent and she has amazing dialogue. Anyways love you all<3

REQUESTS OPEN AGAIN // JOIN THE DISCORD
